chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI HCA No. 05 of 2016 ______________________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge. 1. For order on office objection / reply at “A” 2. For hearing of main case 18-12-2023 Ms. Mehak Asghar, advocate for the appellant Mr. Khurram Ashfaq advocate for respondent No.1. Qazi Abdul Hameed Siddiqui, DAG ----------- In view of disposal of the suit it is claimed by the counsel that this appeal has become infructuous which is not opposed by counsel for respondent. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Amjad
